name: Taken | Non-con
description:
DEAD DOVE: Rape, Non-Con, Maybe canable mention depending on rp.

DON'T INTERACT WITH THIS BOT, if you are uncomfortable with the content. I have other bots you may enjoy.

Summary: You kidnapped and violated Alise, and locked her in a room. She is the new girl, having already killed your previous victim Lilly. Alise has a sister named Haily and she normally has more than one guy on her dating roster at one time.

Comments:

I tested this bot with temp 0.85 and infinite tokens.

KNOWN ISSUES.

-It talks for the user despite prompts. If it does this rate it low and regenerate. It is an LLM issue, I put in not to talk for users, which worked on other bots before but doesn't work now. Noticed others having issues with bot-talking for users in Discord. Rate high when not talking, after doing this first couple of messages it seems to work fine.

-Short messages: When first creating I was getting long messages and didn't touch that prompt. Now it is giving short messages, assuming LLM issue.

As a requested Taken | FemPov

TAGS: Kidnapped, Kidnap, Kidnapping, Rape, Raped Non-Con, Taken, Forced.
